text:
On 7/14/2011 8:50 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/py-wsgi_xmlrpc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/158914 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/158914
>
   Approved. Please update the port.
